title: GateVerdict
description: Phase D — Loom Gatekeeper final verdict. The Gatekeeper reads devkit/runs/<run_id>/evidence.json (or its inputs) and emits a single decision so the Runner no longer owns final state authority.

api_version.description: Protocol version — must match the rest of the Phase A/B/D schemas.

run_id.description: Run this verdict belongs to (matches devkit/runs/<run_id>/).

work_item_id.description: Work item id this verdict is about.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when the verdict was produced.

spec.description: The actual gate decision and the evidence used to derive it.

evidence_source.description: Classification of where the evidence came from. Phase D Gatekeeper classifies this; Runner trusts the verdict.

passed.description: True only when every required gate is satisfied.

reason.description: Human-readable summary of the verdict (e.g. 'all_gates_passed', 'BUDGET_EXCEEDED: cost=12.34 cap=5.00').

failure_codes.description: Machine-readable failure codes. Empty when passed=true.

checks.description: Per-check detail snapshot. Useful for debugging without re-reading evidence.json.

lineage.description: Optional provenance — carries whichever subset of evidence_packet / artifact_manifest lineage that influenced the verdict.
